articles.title: Taiwan's opposition leader arrives in China for a 'Journey of Peace'
articles.summary: The visit takes place ahead of President Trump's own summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping next month, where Taiwan is expected to be a top agenda item.

articles.title: Vance Visits Hungary to Boost Orban Before Election
articles.summary: The trip by the American vice president, JD Vance, makes clear that Russia is not the only country invested in a victory for Hungary’s leader, Viktor Orban.

articles.title: Trump's deadline for an Iran deal looms. And, Artemis II crew begins the journey home
articles.summary: In a press conference last night, Trump reiterated threats against Iran if the country doesn't accept a deal by 8:00 p.m. ET tonight. And, the Artemis II crew are on their way back to Earth.

articles.title: As Trump's deadline approaches, Iranian leaders respond in defiance
articles.summary: Hours away from President Trump's 8 pm ET Tuesday deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz, attacks continued in the Persian Gulf with no agreement in sight. Trump has threatened to bomb Iranian

articles.title: How Bill Phillips used flowing water to model the economy
articles.summary: Bill Phillips was an outsider to economics, but he used a machine and a chart to change the way we think about the government's role in a capitalist economy.

articles.title: Trump Threatens ‘Complete Demolition’ by Midnight, and Dark Money Flows Into Midterms
articles.summary: Plus, a look behind the moon.

articles.title: Beer cans, helium balloons and mortgages: An unexpected mix of things affected by war
articles.summary: It's not just oil and gas that are affected by the Iran war. All sorts of shortages and price spikes are starting to pop up that stand to affect people's daily lives.

articles.title: Texas Considers Required Reading List for Schools, Which Includes the Bible
articles.summary: Education officials are planning an overhaul to English and social studies in the nation’s largest Republican led state.

articles.title: Bracing for federal cuts, some states are already paring back Medicaid services
articles.summary: Paying for doulas to help birthing moms in maternity care deserts was a priority for Montana. But it halted the plan amid a budget shortfall and fears over coming federal Medicaid cuts.

articles.title: AI in the mental health care workforce is met with fear, pushback — and enthusiasm
articles.summary: Artificial intelligence tools that help mental health therapists take notes and keep records are quickly entering the marketplace. But some question the safety of AI in mental health care delivery.

articles.title: Artemis II astronauts swung by the moon, broke an Apollo record, and saw an eclipse
articles.summary: The NASA moon mission completed several key milestones as its crew looped around the lunar body. It's expected to splash down on Earth on Friday.

articles.title: Vance visits Hungary to bolster support for prime minister ahead of election
articles.summary: Vice President JD Vance is in Budapest to join an election rally for incumbent Prime Minister Viktor Orbán ahead of Hungary's election.

articles.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
articles.summary: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.

articles.title: Why Hungary’s Election Could Swing on Roma Votes
articles.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s policies affecting the Roma minority have put those voters in play in upcoming parliamentary elections. In a tight race, they could make the difference.

articles.title: Trump Says Iran Proposal Isn’t Enough to Stop Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants
articles.summary: President Trump has told Iran it must open the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Tuesday or face the consequences, although he has delayed previous deadlines.

articles.title: Hegseth Likens Easter Rescue of U.S. Airman to Resurrection of Jesus Christ
articles.summary: President Trump also asserted that God supports the American war against Iran “because God is good, and God wants to see people taken care of.”

articles.title: Trump provides details behind the dramatic rescue of an American airman trapped in Iran
articles.summary: President Trump revealed many of the dramatic details on how the U.S. military scrambled to rescue two members of fighter jet that was shot down deep inside Iran.

articles.title: Trump reiterates threats to bomb Iran's power plants and bridges
articles.summary: The president has had mixed messages about how and when the U.S.-Israel-led war in Iran will end.

articles.title: Trump threatens Iran's power plants, bridges. And, Artemis II readies for lunar flyby
articles.summary: Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz. And, NASA's Artemis II crew prepares to make its closest approach to the moon.

articles.title: Dominion still has pending lawsuits against election deniers such as Rudy Giuliani and Sidney Powell
